# Eastern Zad Company — شركة زاد الشرقية
# Official website: https://easternzad.com

## Company
- Name (AR): شركة زاد الشرقية
- Name (EN): Eastern Zad Company
- Industry: Cold chain logistics, refrigerated food distribution, exclusive food agencies
- Country: Saudi Arabia
- Headquarters: Jubail Industrial City, Eastern Province, Saudi Arabia
- Coordinates: 26.959771, 49.568742
- Email: info@easternzad.com
- WhatsApp: +966 54 071 2087
- Phone: tel:+966540712087

## Services
- Refrigerated and frozen product distribution across Saudi Arabia
- Cold storage warehouses (ISO 22000, HACCP standards)
- Exclusive food brand agencies
- Inter-regional refrigerated transport (+18°C to -40°C)
- B2B partnership programs for producers and distributors
- Restaurant and hospitality chilled supply

## Coverage (9 regions)
Eastern Province HQ (Jubail Industrial City, Dammam, Khobar), Riyadh, Jeddah, Madinah, Yanbu, Hail, Qassim, Jazan, Asir

## Scale
- 5,500+ client outlets
- 50+ refrigerated trucks
- 24/7 operations support
- 3 certified quality standards (SFDA, ISO 22000, HACCP)

## Certifications
ISO 22000, SFDA licensed, HACCP, GDP, ISO 9001

## Languages
Arabic (primary), English — toggle on website or ?lang=en
